description_long: This restaurant features a compact, corner-lot design with a dark wood exterior and a prominent anime-themed sign above the entrance, specifically referencing 'One Piece.' The facade includes large wooden slat window coverings and a small awning over the entrance, which is flanked by two bins and a decorative blue noren curtain with white patterns. A flower bed with a mix of greenery and pink flowers, as well as a blue bucket, adds a touch of color and life to the sidewalk area. The side of the building is mostly solid wood paneling, with a single large window providing a view into the interior. The overall structure is boxy and modern, with minimal ornamentation aside from the signage and noren curtain.
description: A compact, dark wood restaurant with anime-themed signage, a blue noren curtain, and a flower bed at the entrance. The facade features large wooden slats and a single large window.
description_view_0: Front corner view showing the anime 'One Piece' sign, blue noren curtain, entrance bins, and flower bed.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large window, flower bed, and wooden slat facade, with the sign partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear side view showing mostly solid wood paneling and a glimpse of the flower bed.
description_view_3: Back view displaying a plain, uninterrupted wood-paneled wall with no windows or decorations.
attribute_signage: Large 'One Piece' anime sign above the entrance, yellow stylized text on a black background, and a smaller yellow-on-black sign below the awning.
attribute_facade_design: The facade is dominated by dark wood paneling and large horizontal wooden slats, giving it a modern yet traditional feel. A blue noren curtain with white patterns hangs at the entrance, and a flower bed with mixed plants softens the exterior. The signage is bold and colorful, contrasting with the otherwise subdued palette.
attribute_window_displays: A flower bed with greenery and pink flowers is visible in front of the large window, along with a blue bucket.
